pattern: A combination's AND stays positive iff some bit is set in every chosen number, so the answer is simply the most popular single bit across all numbers.
hints: For the AND of a group to be nonzero, at least one bit position must be 1 in every member of the group.
Fix a bit position; the largest group keeping that bit alive is just all numbers that already have that bit set.
For each bit 0..30, count how many candidates have it set. The answer is the maximum of those counts.

edge_inputs.description: mixed numbers sharing a common high bit
two equal numbers share all their bits
single element, the group is itself
powers of two share no bit so answer is one
all share the lowest bit despite differing elsewhere
the biggest group hinges on a low bit not the obvious high one

stress.description: many values within the bit range to stress per-bit counting
stress.note: uniform values so several bits compete for the maximum count
